app.title: PageMind
app.tagline: Intelligence for your documents. Stays on your machine.

home.heading: PageMind
home.subheading: Intelligence for your documents. Stays on your machine.

catalogue.title: Tools
catalogue.subtitle: Pick a tool, or chain them on the chain page.

chain.title: Chain builder
chain.subtitle: Add tools in order. Each step's outputs feed the next.
chain.drop-files: Drop files here, or click to choose
chain.drop-hint: Up to {max} files. Tools that need a PDF accept PDFs only.
chain.no-nodes: No tools yet. Add the first one.
chain.error-no-input: Upload at least one file before running.
chain.error-no-nodes: Add at least one tool before running.

anonymize.non-en-warning: Non-English input detected. OPF is English-primary; consider switching the preset to {preset} for better recall.
anonymize.install-body: OPF is the detection engine. It is not installed by default because it pulls in torch + transformers (~250 MB) and downloads a model checkpoint (~4 GB) on first run into ~/.opf/privacy_filter. Everything stays on your machine — no telemetry, no cloud round-trips.
anonymize.install-cmd-label: Run this in a terminal at the repo root:

ocr-to-markdown.title: OCR to Markdown
ocr-to-markdown.subtitle: Drop a PDF or image. Get clean Markdown, page by page.
ocr-to-markdown.drop-here: Drop a PDF or image here, or click to choose
ocr-to-markdown.drop-help: PDF or image · max {maxMb} MB · max {maxPages} pages
ocr-to-markdown.stream-region: OCR output, updates as pages are processed
ocr-to-markdown.error-not-supported: Unsupported file type. Use a PDF or image.
